description: Style Note You can see the smooth blend of style and comfort in this remanika creation. This printed colourful dress can be worn out on a casual date or an evening spent hanging out in a cafe with friends. Pair it with black strappy sandals for a elegant understated look. Product Details Pink, white, black and grey printed dress, has a crossover V neckline with ruffle around it and is sleeveless Material and Care 100% rayon Hand wash only Do not bleach and flat dry only Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M which measures 85 cm from shoulder to hem
